name: Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and up to 30 hours of battery life. Perfect for travel and focus.

name: Minimalist Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with tactile switches and customizable RGB backlighting. Sleek aluminum frame.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Fully adjustable mesh office chair with lumbar support, 3D armrests, and a breathable design for all-day comfort.

name: Smart Fitness Watch
description: Water-resistant smartwatch with heart rate monitoring, GPS, and sleep tracking. Compatible with iOS and Android.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Maker
description: Artisan-crafted ceramic dripper for a clean, flavorful cup of coffee. Includes 100 paper filters.

name: Professional Chef's Knife
description: 8-inch high-carbon stainless steel chef's knife. Razor-sharp edge and an ergonomic Pakkawood handle.

name: Matte Black Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. 32oz.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Compact, waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound and 15 hours of playtime. Ideal for outdoors.

name: Linen Throw Blanket
description: Soft, breathable 100% European linen throw. Perfect for cozy evenings on the couch or as a bed accent. 50x60 inches.

name: Leather Messenger Bag
description: Classic full-grain leather messenger bag with a padded laptop compartment, multiple pockets, and adjustable strap.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells going from 5 to 50 lbs each with a quick-turn dial system.

name: Modern Table Lamp
description: Sleek brass table lamp with a frosted glass globe shade. Includes a warm, energy-efficient LED bulb.
